'''monadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wrathless|wrathless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wrathless|wrathless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| monadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:monadhithi|monadhithi]] || [[word:monadhiji|monadhiji]] || [[word:monadhishi|monadhishi]] || [[word:monadhiki|monadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:monadhuthuthu|monadhuthuthu]] || [[word:monadhujuju|monadhujuju]] || [[word:monadhushushu|monadhushushu]] || [[word:monadhukuku|monadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:monadhuthu|monadhuthu]] || [[word:monadhuju|monadhuju]] || [[word:monadhushu|monadhushu]] || [[word:monadhuku|monadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:monadhufthuf|monadhufthuf]] || [[word:monadhufjuf|monadhufjuf]] || [[word:monadhufshuf|monadhufshuf]] || [[word:monadhufkuf|monadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:monadhethe|monadhethe]] || [[word:monadheje|monadheje]] || [[word:monadheshe|monadheshe]] || [[word:monadheke|monadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:monadhothotho|monadhothotho]] || [[word:monadhojojo|monadhojojo]] || [[word:monadhoshosho|monadhoshosho]] || [[word:monadhokoko|monadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:monadhotho|monadhotho]] || [[word:monadhojo|monadhojo]] || [[word:monadhosho|monadhosho]] || [[word:monadhoko|monadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:monadhofthof|monadhofthof]] || [[word:monadhofjof|monadhofjof]] || [[word:monadhofshof|monadhofshof]] || [[word:monadhofkof|monadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfthĂŻf|monadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfjĂŻf|monadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfshĂŻf|monadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfkĂŻf|monadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|monadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|monadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|monadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|monadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfthĂŻf|monadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfjĂŻf|monadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfshĂŻf|monadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfkĂŻf|monadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfthĂŻf|monadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfjĂŻf|monadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfshĂŻf|monadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:monadhĂŻfkĂŻf|monadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:monadhĂŠthĂŠ|monadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:monadhĂŠjĂŠ|monadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:monadhĂŠshĂŠ|monadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:monadhĂŠkĂŠ|monadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:monadhathatha|monadhathatha]] || [[word:monadhajaja|monadhajaja]] || [[word:monadhashasha|monadhashasha]] || [[word:monadhakaka|monadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:monadhatha|monadhatha]] || [[word:monadhaja|monadhaja]] || [[word:monadhasha|monadhasha]] || [[word:monadhaka|monadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:monadhafthaf|monadhafthaf]] || [[word:monadhafjaf|monadhafjaf]] || [[word:monadhafshaf|monadhafshaf]] || [[word:monadhafkaf|monadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:monadhasha|monadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:monadhshĂ«sha|monadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:monadhrosha|monadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:monadhmusha|monadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:monadhyasha|monadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomonadhnkshĂ«sha|gomonadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomonadhnkrosha|gomonadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomonadhnkmusha|gomonadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomonadhnkyasha|gomonadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:monanadhasha|monanadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:monanadhshĂ«sha|monanadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:monanadhrosha|monanadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:monanadhmusha|monanadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:monanadhyasha|monanadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomonanadhnkshĂ«sha|gomonanadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomonanadhnkrosha|gomonanadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomonanadhnkmusha|gomonanadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomonanadhnkyasha|gomonanadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:menĂŠdhasha|menĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:menĂŠdhshĂ«sha|menĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:menĂŠdhrosha|menĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:menĂŠdhmusha|menĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:menĂŠdhyasha|menĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomenĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gomenĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomenĂŠdhnkrosha|gomenĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomenĂŠdhnkmusha|gomenĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomenĂŠdhnkyasha|gomenĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:monfadhasha|monfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:monfadhshĂ«sha|monfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:monfadhrosha|monfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:monfadhmusha|monfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:monfadhyasha|monfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomonfadhnkshĂ«sha|gomonfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomonfadhnkrosha|gomonfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomonfadhnkmusha|gomonfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomonfadhnkyasha|gomonfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
